heading: Rights and remedies of the United States Government reserved
label: 3544 Rights and remedies of the United States Government reserved
text: This subchapter does not affect a right or remedy the United States Government has by law to recover a tax, debt, or demand.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)354431:520.R.S. § 3638.The words “relating to distress warrants” and “take away or” are omitted as surplus.
